emails.subject: Re: Confidentiality Agreement
emails.body: Tana I spoke to John. They are comfortable with the changes made by GM. Please finalize the NDA and let's see if we can route it to them today for signature. Thanks. Mark Senior Counsel, ENA Phone: 713-345-8897 Facsimile: 713-646-3940 E-Mail: Mark.Greenberg@enron.com Forwarded by Mark Greenberg/NA/Enron on 04/12/2001 04:01 PM richard.dix@gm.com 04/12/2001 08:08 AM
